# CMTimeMappingShow(_:)

**Function**

Prints a description of a time mapping to standard output.

## Declaration

```swift
func CMTimeMappingShow(_ mapping: CMTimeMapping)
```

## Parameters

- **mapping**: The time mapping to show.

## Discussion

You typically use this function for debugging purposes.

## Representing Time Mappings

- **CMTimeMappingCopyAsDictionary(_:allocator:)**: Returns a dictionary representation of a time mapping.
- **CMTimeMappingCopyDescription(allocator:mapping:)**: Copies a string description of a time mapping.

items.description: Returns a dictionary representation of a time mapping.
items.name: CMTimeMappingCopyAsDictionary(_:allocator:)

items.description: Copies a string description of a time mapping.
